arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag set for return to management after Man Utd sacking
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag set for return to management after Man Utd sacking Ten Hag was sacked as manager of Man Utd in November after just over two years in the job.

arts.sum: Nine days after his official transfer to AC Milan, Santiago Gimenez returns home. The Feijenoord Stadium, affectionately known as "de Kuip" (the Bathtub), truly became a nurturing ground for the Mexican striker. arts.ttl: Champions League | Feynoord v AC Milan: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Feyenoord will face AC Milan in the Champions League knockout playoff round with a series of key players sidelined. Manager Brian Priske has been sacked, leaving the Dutch side in turmoil ahead of a huge match in prospect. Austrian defender Gernot Trauner is unlikely to feature for a third consecutive match. The absence list also includes goalkeeper Justin Bijlow, as well as Calvin Stengs, Chris-Kevin Nadje, and Ramiz Zerrouki. Timon Wellenreuther is expected to continue in goal for the Dutch side. The post Champions League | Feynoord v AC Milan: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: AC Milan head to Feyenoord this evening in the first leg of their Champions League play-off tie.
